mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_emission_factor ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_emission_factor WHERE energy_source LIKE '%' + #{energySource} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emission_factor WHERE energy_source LIKE '%' + #{energySource} + '%'
SELECT * FROM tb_emission_factor ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_emission_factor (energy_source, unit, factor_value, base_year, reference_org, scope, remark, reg_user, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{energySource}, #{unit}, #{factorValue}, #{baseYear}, #{referenceOrg}, #{scope}, #{remark}, #{regUser}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_emission_factor SET energy_source = #{energySource}, unit = #{unit}, factor_value = #{factorValue}, base_year = #{baseYear}, reference_org = #{referenceOrg}, scope = #{scope}, remark = #{remark}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
